notes: Carestream docs: Reports > Accounting > Registers > Period → Output Options → Excel → Register Setup.
Interaction: keyboard OR mouse, SoftDent (SDWIN) windows only — never AMD (Alt+R = Instant Replay).
Prefer SoftDent Win32 menu_select (Reports->Accounting->Registers->Period); F10+letters fallback.
MUST click Excel prompt then Enter for Excel export — NEVER Printer, NEVER File.
Print Preview path: click Print Preview prompt then Enter — page through with Next/PageDown when detail spans pages; go to LAST page for exact totals (visual read). Page 1 alone is often incomplete.
HARD RULE: Excel or Print Preview only — never Printer, never File (Output Options).
NEVER Esc on SoftDent main (quit). Enter=OK, Tab=fields, Space=checkbox (Carestream KystrkSht).
Launch only via desktop/Programs shortcut CS SoftDent Software.lnk (-sus).

Select File Name: SoftDent uses ONE path edit (SoftDent's folder\\stem) + static .XLS. Keep SoftDent's folder (this office: E:\\OneDrive\\Documents). Never substitute SoftDentReportExports/C:\\SOFTDE~1 — SoftDent rejects those. NR2 copies the XLS into SoftDentReportExports after SoftDent saves.
Collections F10 path: Reports → Practice Management (p) → Collection Reports — not Accounting (a). Close Chrome Claim Management during morning Excel bundle (focus thief).

collections.label: Collection Reports — Summary
collections.menuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Collection Reports → Summary
collections.note: Output Options: click Excel→Enter for file, or Print Preview→Enter then last page for visual totals.

transactions.label: Transactions for a Period
transactions.menuPath: Reports → Accounting → Trans for a Period
transactions.note: Period automation converts Excel→CSV; do not fake .csv by copying XLS bytes.

writeoff_totals.label: Writeoff Totals
writeoff_totals.menuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Insurance Reports → Writeoff Totals
writeoff_totals.note: Operator: Excel not available/usable for this report — Print Preview only; read LAST page for totals.

insurance_payment_distribution.label: Insurance Payment Distribution
insurance_payment_distribution.note: Operator: Excel not available — Print Preview only. May lack ADA line items.

insurance_payment_analysis.label: Insurance Income (Print Preview — gold candidate)
insurance_payment_analysis.menuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Insurance Reports → Insurance Income
insurance_payment_analysis.note: HAL-10589: Excel NOT available. Output Options → Print Preview → Enter → Next/PageDown through pages as needed → LAST page for totals. Never Printer. empty != $0; Print Preview does not populate sd_insurance_payment_lines.

production_by_ada_code.label: Production by ADA Code (PRODBYADA.xls)
production_by_ada_code.menuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Production Reports → Production by ADA Code
production_by_ada_code.note: Excel available. Saves as PRODBYADA.xls (often D:\). SoftDent CODE rollups — NOT InsCo×ADA gold payment lines. Prefer 1-year range.
